description: Iteration 9: Deep testing of debate feature, watchlist/cron integration, and IC report. Add comprehensive tests covering: (1) augur_debate MCP tool end-to-end, (2) DebateProtocol class, (3) run_debate with minority report, (4) watchlist persistence and cron-run flow, (5) IC leaderboard calculation correctness, (6) Spearman rank correlation edge cases.
steps: Test class TestDebateFeature: test augur_debate MCP tool produces valid results for a ticker with rounds=2, verify minority report in metadata when applicable, verify debate messages accumulate correctly in coordinator._debate_history, test DebateProtocol.initiate_debate() and get_debate_summary()

Test class TestWatchlistCron: test add_to_watchlist persists to YAML correctly (mock WATCHLIST_PATH to tmpdir), test add_to_watchlist updates existing entry, test run_watchlist_analysis processes all items (mock MarketContext/agents), test _send_notifications dispatches to configured channels, test cron schedule parsing with valid and invalid expressions

Test class TestICReport: test Backtester._rank_correlation with known values (e.g. [1,2,3],[1,2,3] should be 1.0, [1,2,3],[3,2,1] should be -1.0), test _check_hit logic for bullish/bearish/neutral, test get_leaderboard returns sorted by ic_20d, test run_backtest with sample data produces correct record counts, test consensus_ic calculation
Ensure all new tests pass with: python -m pytest tests/test_iteration9.py -v
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_iteration9.py has at least 20 tests covering debate, watchlist/cron, and IC report
All tests pass: python -m pytest tests/test_iteration9.py -v
Tests actually exercise real code paths (not just mocking everything)
